contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Fix ceremonial cacao PDP image layout + document hero+.gallery convention
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/81
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/59
  
  Details:
  ## What changed
  
  Fixed the unsightly image layout on three ceremonial-cacao product pages that placed a 50/50 packaging-gallery with figcaptions ("Front of the bag" / "Back — scan the QR code…") above the hero shot, dominating the visual top of the page and pushing the actual product below the fold. Migrated all three to the canonical hero + `.gallery` convention used by the 81% dark chocolate bar PDPs, then documented the convention so future product pages follow the right pattern by default.
  
  Pages migrated (`agroverse_shop_beta`):
  - `product-page/oscar-s-bahia-ceremonial-cacao/index.html`
  - `product-page/ceremonial-cacao-fazenda-santa-ana-2023-200g/index.html`
  - `product-page/ceremonial-cacao-paulo-s-la-do-sitio-farm-2024-200g/index.html`
  
  Per page:
  - Removed the `.packaging-gallery` block (50/50 grid with `<figure>` + `<figcaption>`) from above the hero.
  - Added a `.gallery` grid inside `.product-image-container`, directly below the hero shot.
  - Added the standard `.gallery` CSS next to `.product-image`: auto-fit `minmax(220px, 1fr)`, fixed 220px height, `object-fit: cover`, smaller shadow/radius so supplementary tiles read as supporting visuals.
  - Added `loading="lazy"` to supplementary images; hero stays eager.
  - Dropped the visible `<figcaption>` text — alt text already describes the image and screen-readers pick it up.
  
  Documentation (`agentic_ai_context`):
  - Added a "PDP image layout — hero + `.gallery` underneath" section to `AGROVERSE_SHOP_NEW_SKU_WEB_CHECKLIST.md` with the markup template, CSS block, reasoning for each rule (sticky behavior, mixed-aspect-ratio handling, lazy loading, why no figcaptions), and the reserved packaging filenames (`packaging/{front,back}.jpeg`) for ceremonial-bag SKUs.
  - Updated the `README.md` index entry so future agents discover the convention without reading the full file.
  
  ## Why
  
  Operator feedback: the existing layout looked unsightly with two heavy bag photos dominating the page header. Reference implementation already exists on the 81% dark chocolate bar pages — there was simply no written contract, so future PDPs would have kept drifting. Documenting the convention before the cleanup ensures the next PDP someone builds (whether an AI agent or a human) starts from the right pattern.
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/81 (merged)
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/59 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
